def solve(l, r, directions)
    
    def process_integer(x, directions)
        # 1. Formatting x to 16 digits
        s_x = x.to_s.rjust(16, '0')
        digits = s_x.chars.map(&:to_i)

        # 2. Grid Population (4x4)
        grid = Array.new(4) { Array.new(4) }
        
        digits.each_with_index do |d, i|
            row = i / 4
            col = i % 4
            grid[row][col] = d
        end
        
        # 3 & 4. Path Traversal and Sequence Recording
        path_sequence = []
        r_coord = 0
        c_coord = 0
        
        # Record starting cell value
        path_sequence << grid[r_coord][c_coord]
        
        # Process 6 directions (7 total points visited)
        6.times do |i|
            dir = directions[i]
            
            # Apply move
            if dir == 'D'
                r_coord += 1
            elsif dir == 'R'
                c_coord += 1
            end
            
            # Record new cell value. Coordinates are guaranteed to be within [0, 3]
            # because the total displacement is (3, 3).
            path_sequence << grid[r_coord][c_coord]
        end
        
        # 5. Non-decreasing Check
        is_non_decreasing = true
        (0...6).each do |i|
            # Check if sequence[i] <= sequence[i+1]
            if path_sequence[i] > path_sequence[i+1]
                is_non_decreasing = false
                break
            end
        end
        
        return is_non_decreasing
    end

    count = 0
    
    (l..r).each do |x|
        if process_integer(x, directions)
            count += 1
        end
    end
    
    count
end
